configurePresets.name: openblas-ilp64
configurePresets.description: ILP64 OpenBLAS build. Point CMake at your OpenBLAS install via CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH (env var or -D). NOTE: an ILP64 OpenBLAS must be discoverable by the name openblas64 (CMake FindBLAS appends 64 for 8-byte integers); if your install only ships libopenblas, add an openblas64 symlink. Compilers (CC/CXX/FC) and host-specific paths belong in a local CMakeUserPresets.json that inherits this preset.

configurePresets.name: netlib
configurePresets.description: Reference BLAS/LAPACK built from the bundled NetLib sources. Always works but is unoptimized; use as a correctness baseline.
